node.name: Scope & Research Questions
node.objective: Define exact research questions, scope boundaries, and what a good answer looks like

node.name: Primary Evidence
node.objective: Core data, statistics, facts — what is empirically known

node.name: Stakeholder & Player Landscape
node.objective: Who are the key actors, what are their positions, incentives, and influence

node.name: Trend & Trajectory Analysis
node.objective: Direction of travel — what is changing, accelerating, or reversing

node.name: Pattern Recognition
node.objective: What patterns emerge across the three research branches; where do they agree and conflict

node.name: Implications & So-What
node.objective: What do these patterns mean for the original research question — concrete implications

node.name: Counter-Thesis & Risks
node.objective: What evidence challenges the emerging thesis; what risks or blind spots exist

node.name: Research Synthesis
node.objective: Final answer to the research question with confidence level. Include: key findings, confidence score, caveats, recommended next questions. End with vs-vanilla-Claude summary.
